view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for Zoom integration is satisfied as evidenced by the successful creation of a Zoom meeting link.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for Zoom integration is satisfied as evidenced by the successful creation of a Zoom meeting link.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams integration. The linked use case describes a scenario where a Zoom meeting is automatically created and a link is generated, confirming that the integration is operational. The evidence from the linked use case directly supports the requirement, demonstrating that the system can create unique Zoom meeting links for appointments.
